enabled.description: Master on/off switch for the whole plugin.

leagues.description: Which leagues to pull games from. Each league runs its own ESPN fetch/logo pipeline (see LEAGUE_TO_SPORT_KEY in manager.py) and its games are merged into one rotation.

favorite_teams.description: Team abbreviations to prioritize. Meaning depends on show_favorite_teams_only below.

show_favorite_teams_only.description: If true, only ever show games involving a favorite team. If false, show all games but let live_priority/favorite ordering below still apply.

show_all_live.description: Show every live game, not just favorite teams' (ignored if show_favorite_teams_only is true).

live_priority.description: If any favorite team is currently live, jump to/stay on that game ahead of other live games in the rotation.

update_interval_seconds.description: How often to poll ESPN while a game is live. Lower = more current, more API calls.

game_duration_seconds.description: How long to hold on one live game before rotating to the next (if multiple are live).

upcoming.description: Scheduled games that haven't started yet.

games_to_show.description: Max number of upcoming games to include in the rotation.
Max number of recent final games to include in the rotation.

show_ranking.description: Show AP/CFP ranking instead of record when both are enabled (college only -- no-op for NFL games).

show_odds.description: Show betting odds when ESPN provides them.

display_duration.description: Fallback duration (seconds) used by the core rotation when a more specific *_duration_seconds above doesn't apply.

test_mode.description: Preview sample data for a view directly on the display, without needing a real live/recent/upcoming game -- useful for checking how a layout actually looks on real hardware.

view.description: Which sample view to show. "all" cycles through all three every display_duration.
